query: SELECT DISTINCT u.id, u.email, u.cpf, COUNT(a.id) as total_acoes FROM users u LEFT JOIN pdis p ON u.id = p.colaboradorId LEFT JOIN actions a ON p.id = a.pdiId WHERE a.id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY u.id ORDER BY total_acoes DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.671da1035469 --database Uksxtg83ZJDkZPJL3fCmwT --execute SELECT DISTINCT u.id, u.email, u.cpf, COUNT(a.id) as total_acoes FROM users u LEFT JOIN pdis p ON u.id = p.colaboradorId LEFT JOIN actions a ON p.id = a.pdiId WHERE a.id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY u.id ORDER BY total_acoes DESC;
